title: Auto Breeding
description: Why feed animals when they can feed themselves
body:
Auto Breeding

This is a simple plugin aimed at removing the need
For feeding each animal. instead, let them feast on
Nearby crops and breed themselves like they would
In nature.


Current Hard Settings:
Breed Eligibility - 5 Ticks
Feed/Breed Calls - 5 Minutes
(roughly the same as normal Minecraft)
Animal crop check range - 5 Blocks



[​IMG]
